title: Let's Go Kaikigumi Anime Releases New Trailer
content: Let’s Go Kaikigumi released a new trailer along with a July 5 premiere date. The trailer was first shown at this year’s AnimeJapan 2026 event. Additionally, Mayumi Shintani joins the cast as Cursed Doll.
author: Anime Corner

title: Made in Abyss: Awakening Mystery Anime Reveals New Key Visual, October 23 Premiere
content: Made in Abyss anime revealed a new key visual for Part 1 of its theatrical film series, Awakening Mystery . The first installment is set to premiere in Japan on October 23, 2026.
author: Anime Corner

title: Dr. Stone Final Season Reveals Episode 25 Preview Trailer and Images
content: Dr. Stone: Science Future (Season 4) Cour 3 (final) revealed the preview images and trailer for Episode 1 (Episode 25 of the season). The episode is titled “Future Engine,” and it’s scheduled for an April 2 premiere date . You can watch the preview trailer below. You can see some more images below.
author: Anime Corner

title: Farming Life in Another World 2 Anime Reveals 2nd Trailer, 6 More Cast
content: Pony Canyon's stage presentation at the AnimeJapan 2026 event on Sunday revealed the key visual, more cast members, and second trailer for Farming Life in Another World 2, the second anime season based on Kinosuke Naito's Farming Life in Another World (Isekai Nonbiri Nōka) light novel series.
author: ANN

title: Suikoden Anime Announces 8 More Cast Members
content: The special stage event for Suikoden: The Anime, the adaptation of Konami's Suikoden II game's story, announced more cast members and unveiled the anime's fourth image visual at AnimeJapan 2026 on Sunday.
author: ANN

title: 'Nijusseiki Denki Mokuroku' Reveals Additional Cast, Staff, Theme Songs, Second Promo
content: The Nijusseiki Denki Mokuroku ( Sparks of Tomorrow ) Blue Stage revealed additional cast, staff, theme songs, second key visual (pictured), and a second promotional video on Sunday. The anime, adapting Hiro Yuuki 's historical romance light novel , is scheduled to premiere on July 5 at 11:00 p.m.
author: MyAnimeList

title: Rascal Does Not Dream of a Dear Friend Film's Teaser Reveals October 16 Release Date
content: Aniplex unveiled a new teaser trailer for Seishun Buta Yarō wa Dear Friend no Yume o Minai (Rascal Does Not Dream of a Dear Friend) film, the latest anime adaptation of Hajime Kamoshida's Rascal Does Not Dream (Seishun Buta Yarō or Aobuta) novel series, during its stage event for the film at AnimeJapan 2026 on Sunday.
author: ANN

title: 'Gensou Suikoden' Announces Supporting Cast
content: The Gensou Suikoden ( Suikoden: The Anime ) White Stage at AnimeJapan 2026 revealed supporting cast members and a fourth key visual (pictured) on Sunday. The anime series adapting Konami's fantasy role-playing game will begin airing in October 2026.
author: MyAnimeList

title: 'Rakudai Kenja no Gakuin Musou' Announces Additional Cast, Teaser Promo
content: The Rakudai Kenja no Gakuin Musou: Nidome no Tensei, S-Rank Cheat Majutsushi Boukenroku ( The Failed Sage's Academy Domination ) AnimeJapan 2026 stage event at the NBCUniversal booth revealed additional cast and a teaser promotional video on Sunday.
author: MyAnimeList

title: 'Heroine? Saint? No, I'm an All-Works Maid (And Proud of It)!' TV Anime Reveals July Debut, More Cast
content: The official website for the television anime of Atekichi and Yukiko's Heroine? Saint? No, I'm an All-Works Maid (And Proud of It)! (Heroine? Seijo? Iie, All Works Maid desu (ko)!) light novel series revealed a teaser promotional video and one more cast member on Sunday.
author: ANN
